race.comment: MATRON SAMSING (2) is much better than last start and worth another chance. Was in great form in similar grade winning two on end before being slowly away last time and finished well back. Back in grade and well worth another chance. ENTERPRISE LASSIE (5)  has been thereabouts without winning, the latest placing in weight for age class behind Wolfburn. Back in grade and expected to feature in this line-up. FABERGE TZAR (6) was placed two back then finished well back over further here last time. Tricky gate but has speed and will take catching. Likewise VALLEY PRINCE (7) has speed and looks one of those going feared. In great recent form and must be included. STARLITE REBEL (9) has a low draw and can do much better.
